steps.title: At least 1 day before the...
steps.instruction: At least 1 day before the perfusions prepare 4 % paraformaldehyde (PFA) (Sigma-Aldrich; 441244; CAS:30525-89-4) inside the hood (40 g PFA in 1 l PBS (Gibco; 21600-096)). Put a magnetic stirrer and put the stirring speed below “3” and the heath of the heating plate between “2 and 3”. Let it steer till afternoon or Overnight .

steps.title: When the PFA is dissolved, filter...
steps.instruction: When the PFA is dissolved, filter the solution with a filter paper (Whatman; 10311853) and a funnel and put the filtered PFA in the fridge.

steps.title: Take the dissection materials needed out...
steps.instruction: Take the dissection materials needed out of the oven (tin box with dissection material).

steps.title: Put on the LAF/chemical cabinet by...
steps.instruction: Put on the LAF/chemical cabinet by putting on both the LAF (fan symbol on cabinet) and the chemical flow (the button at the bottom right stand of the cabinet).

steps.title: Take the perfusion bags out of...
steps.instruction: Take the perfusion bags out of the fridge and fill the PFA bag:

steps.title: Keep the bag upside down
steps.instruction: Keep the bag upside down.

steps.title: Remove the plastic tube that closes the bag
steps.instruction: Remove the plastic tube that closes the bag.

steps.title: Put the syringe where you just removed the plastic tube
steps.instruction: Put the syringe where you just removed the plastic tube.

steps.title: Pour the PFA in the syringe...
steps.instruction: Pour the PFA in the syringe so that the bag will be filled.

steps.title: Close the bag again with the plastic tube
steps.instruction: Close the bag again with the plastic tube. Illustration of filling the perfusion bag with PFA

steps.title: Hang the 0
steps.instruction: Hang the 0.9 % saline (Vetivex; BE-V442041) and the 4 % PFA bags on the hook next to the LAF/chemical cabinet, screw a 24 G needle (Terumo; AN*2425R1) on the saline and the PFA rubber cable and make sure the wheels of the 2 bags are screwed up (open position). Opening wheel of the saline and PFA bag

steps.title: Fill a number of plastic cans,...
steps.instruction: Fill a number of plastic cans, equal to the number of mice to be perfused, with PFA.

steps.title: Prepare the dolethal (Vetoquinol; BE-V171692) dilution...
steps.instruction: Prepare the dolethal (Vetoquinol; BE-V171692) dilution to anesthetize the animals before perfusion. It is a 1/3 dolethal dilution in 0.9 % saline (1 ml dolethal in 2 ml saline). There is a bag of saline stored in the fridge and you can take the needed volume with a syringe with a needle. Saline collection with a syringe

steps.title: Inject a mouse intraperitoneal with 180...
steps.instruction: Inject a mouse intraperitoneal with 180 µl dolethal dilution and wait a minute or 2.

steps.title: When the mouse lays down, bring...
steps.instruction: When the mouse lays down, bring it over to the cabinet and check its reflexes by pinching one of the hind paws with thick tweezers. If the responses stay out, fix the mouse on a pile of thick tissues with 4 24 G needles.

steps.title: Start cutting only the upper skin...
steps.instruction: Start cutting only the upper skin by pulling the skin up with tweezers.

steps.title: Cut open the lower skin until you reach the diaphragm
steps.instruction: Cut open the lower skin until you reach the diaphragm.

steps.title: Carefully cut open the diaphragm without damaging the surrounding organs
steps.instruction: Carefully cut open the diaphragm without damaging the surrounding organs. Cut the ribs at the side and place a clamp on the ribs to flip open the spot of the heart.

steps.title: Via the turning wheel, open the...
steps.instruction: Via the turning wheel, open the saline tap, carefully grab the heart with the tweezers and put the needle in the right bottom part (mouse left ventricle) of the heart. Cut the vein on the other side of the hearth with spring scissors (you will see the blood flow coming out).

steps.title: Let the saline flow through the...
steps.instruction: Let the saline flow through the blood vessels for a couple of minutes. You can check the liver, if it becomes brownish/white, the saline is flowing through.

steps.title: Switch to PFA via the turning...
steps.instruction: Switch to PFA via the turning wheel and let the PFA flow through the blood vessels. You can release one of the hind paws to check if it becomes stiff. Also the tail will move a bit if the PFA runs through.

steps.title: Turn of the PFA by using the stirring wheel
steps.instruction: Turn of the PFA by using the stirring wheel.

steps.title: Collect the brain and put it...
steps.instruction: Collect the brain and put it in the correct 4 % PFA filled can.

steps.title: Let the brain post fix Overnight...
steps.instruction: Let the brain post fix Overnight in PFA at 4 °C .

steps.title: Switch PFA to 0.1 % sodium azide (Sigma-Aldrich; S2002; CAS
steps.instruction: Switch PFA to 0.1 % sodium azide (Sigma-Aldrich; S2002; CAS: 26628-22-8) in PBS and store the brains at 4 °C .
